routes._comment: Homepage — itmcluj.ro is the demo headliner per SITES_COVERAGE.md sec 3.7. The live page is a 2005-era zombie: tables-for-layout, <FONT> tags, <MARQUEE> in the H1, document.write sidebar via meniu.js, and the institution profile (name, address, phone, email, leadership) hidden inside a <TEXTAREA id="txtSource"> that gets reflected into a child iframe. No stable IDs or [data-*] attributes on the page, so selectors here are necessarily structural and target the page's unique anchors. Selector source: direct fetch of http://www.itmcluj.ro/ on 2026-05-02 (29KB, windows-1250 encoded). All four personas must produce visibly different output (task spec) — pensioner strips noise to a single column, pro shows full announcement metadata, journalist surfaces heritage markers and contact data.

extract._comment: Page title — the only <H1> on the page wraps a <MARQUEE> with the institution name ("Inspectoratul Teritorial de Munca Cluj"). Reading textContent strips the <MARQUEE> wrapper and yields just the name.

Announcements list — every announcement is a

containing a single . There is no class hook, but the structural pattern is unique: only announcements use this exact shape. We select by descendant anchor.

Sidebar nav — meniu.js writes a <TABLE> of dark-grey <TD> cells, each containing one navigation <a>. After document.write executes, every sidebar link sits inside a td[bgcolor="#C0C0C0"]. This selector hits all of them.
Telephone numbers and contact list — the page footer block (after announcements) lists phones inside a <UL type="square"> nested in a <FONT>. We match the wrapper UL.

Heritage marker — the institution sigla (siglaITM.JPG) injected by meniu.js into the sidebar. We surface it for the journalist persona because the 2005 timestamp embedded in the file is itself the story.
